articles.title_en: Weimai Declares 'AI First,' Crosses 100M RMB in AI Revenue
articles.title_zh: 微盟宣布 'AI First'，AI 收入首破亿元
articles.content_en: Weimai held its city summit in Shanghai on April 22, 2026, publicly unveiling an 'AI First' strategy after its AI-related revenue crossed 100 million RMB for the first time in 2025. H2 2025 AI revenue grew 130% half-on-half. The company is rebuilding its SaaS stack on an 'Agent+Skills' architecture — wrapping complex back-end functions into agent-callable Skills so merchants can access data via natural language instead of multi-level menus. The tension: B2B clients have near-zero tolerance for hallucination, and a single bad output can cause an entire AI module to be deemed unusable.
articles.content_zh: 微盟于2026年4月22日在上海举办城市峰会，正式发布 'AI First' 战略。2025年其 AI 相关收入首次突破亿元，下半年环比增长130%。公司将 SaaS 技术架构重建为 'Agent+Skills' 模式，将后台复杂功能封装为 agent 可调用的 Skills，商家通过自然语言即可调取当日交易数据，无需在多级菜单中查找。核心挑战：B 端客户对 hallucination 容忍度极低，一个坏案例即可让整个 AI 模块失去信任。
articles.so_what_en: If you sell AI tools to B2B clients, build a 'bad case' playbook before launch: define which task categories are high-stakes, add output verification layers, and set explicit SLA expectations around AI errors in contracts.
articles.so_what_zh: 向 B 端推 AI 工具前，先制定坏案例预案：划定高风险任务类别，加出输出校验层，并在合同中明确 AI 出错的 SLA 标准。

articles.title_en: Buzzy Launches AI Video-Editing Agent, $20M ARR, $20M Raised
articles.title_zh: Buzzy 发布视频编辑 agent，ARR 和融资额均达两千万美元
articles.content_en: Buzzy, an AI video-editing agent platform built by 'SenseStep,' recently closed a $20M round led by Redpoint at a reported $20M ARR. Users issue natural-language instructions to edit video backgrounds, lighting, product elements, and camera angles without regenerating the entire clip. The founding team includes ex-Apple, Google, and Oculus veterans, with core members from Adobe and Xiaomi. The product targets content creators and SMBs underserved by 'canvas-type' tools that are too complex or rigid template tools that are too inflexible.
articles.content_zh: AI 视频编辑 agent 平台 Buzzy 由'感知阶跃'推出，近期完成 Redpoint 领投的2000万美元融资，ARR 同样约达2000万美元。用户用自然语言指令对视频进行背景去除、光线修正、产品替换等局部精修，无需重新生成整段视频。团队核心成员来自 Apple、Google、Oculus、Adobe 和小米。产品定位：填补'画布型'工具门槛过高、模板类工具不够灵活之间的空白，主攻内容创作者和中小商家。
articles.so_what_en: Test Buzzy for product video refreshes: swap backgrounds and lighting for seasonal campaigns without a full reshoot. Compare turnaround time and cost against your current video production workflow.
articles.so_what_zh: 用 Buzzy 测试商品视频焕新：换背景、调光线应对大促季，对比现有拍摄流程的时间与成本。

articles.title_en: Musk vs. Altman Trial Starts April 27: Brand Safety Watch
articles.title_zh: Musk vs. Altman 庭审4月27日开启，品牌需关注舆论风险
articles.content_en: A trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI is scheduled to begin in Oakland on April 27, 2026, covering claims of fraud and unfair business practices. The legal proceedings put both xAI and OpenAI executives on the stand during a period when brands are actively building AI-powered marketing stacks on these platforms. The courtroom drama will generate significant media coverage that could affect public perception of both ChatGPT-based and Grok-based tooling.
articles.content_zh: Elon Musk 与 OpenAI 的庭审定于2026年4月27日在奥克兰开启，涉及欺诈和不正当商业行为指控。xAI 和 OpenAI 高管均将出庭，庭审期间媒体覆盖量将大幅上升。对正在基于 ChatGPT 或 Grok 构建营销工作流的品牌而言，平台舆论风险值得跟踪。

articles.title_en: Sports Marketers Urged to Prioritize Fan Over AI Automation
articles.title_zh: 体育营销：三方建议以球迷优先，谨慎滥用 AI
articles.content_en: Agencies at Digiday's sports marketing roundup are hiring talent from professional leagues and formalizing sports sponsorship into dedicated business units. A recurring warning from three agency voices: brands risk alienating fans by inserting AI-generated content into high-emotion sports moments where authenticity drives engagement. The caution is not to stop using AI but to gate its deployment on emotional-context mapping first.
articles.content_zh: 据 Digiday 报道，多家代理公司正从职业体育联盟引进人才，将体育赞助升级为独立业务单元。三位代理商负责人共同提醒：在高情绪强度的体育场景中滥用 AI 生成内容，会让球迷产生距离感。建议不是停用 AI，而是先做情绪场景映射，再决定 AI 内容的使用边界。
articles.so_what_en: Before deploying AI content in live sports campaigns, map each touchpoint by emotional intensity. Reserve human-crafted copy for high-stakes moments (final whistle, comeback story) and use AI for logistical or informational content.
articles.so_what_zh: 体育营销上线 AI 内容前，先按情绪强度绘制触点地图：决胜时刻用人工撰写，赛程信息等功能性内容再交给 AI。

articles.title_en: DeepSeek Releases New Flagship Model One Year After V3 Shock
articles.title_zh: DeepSeek 发布新旗舰模型，距 V3 冲击市场恰满一年
articles.content_en: DeepSeek has unveiled a new flagship AI model, roughly one year after its open-weight release upended Silicon Valley's pricing assumptions. Bloomberg reported the announcement on April 24, 2026, with limited technical details available at time of publication. The prior DeepSeek release prompted multiple vendors to cut API prices and forced marketing teams using closed-source models to revisit their inference cost assumptions.
articles.content_zh: DeepSeek 于2026年4月24日发布新旗舰模型，距其 open-weight 版本震动硅谷恰好约一年。Bloomberg 报道时技术细节尚不完整。上一轮 DeepSeek 发布曾推动多家厂商下调 API 定价，迫使依赖 closed-source 模型的营销团队重新评估 inference 成本。
articles.so_what_en: Track DeepSeek's new model benchmarks and API pricing over the next 72 hours. If cost-per-token drops materially, recalculate your content-generation pipeline costs and reopen vendor comparisons.
articles.so_what_zh: 未来72小时跟踪 DeepSeek 新模型的 benchmark 和 API 定价。若 cost-per-token 显著下降，重新核算内容生成流水线成本并更新供应商对比。

articles.title_en: Local LLM Coding Agents Gain Traction for SMB Marketing Automation
articles.title_zh: 本地 LLM coding agent 在中小企业营销自动化中受关注
articles.content_en: A Reddit thread on r/LocalLLaMA comparing Claude Code and open coding agents against Qwen 3.5/3.6 27B attracted 109 comments and a score of 59 as of April 24, 2026. The discussion reflects a growing segment of lean marketing and growth teams who want agentic coding assistance for automation scripts without API cost exposure. Practical questions around install speed, bug rate, and ease of use suggest this audience is past evaluation and into production use.
articles.content_zh: 2026年4月24日，r/LocalLLaMA 上一篇对比 Claude Code 与本地 coding agent 搭配 Qwen 3.5/3.6 27B 使用的帖子获得59分、109条评论。讨论反映出一类精简型营销和增长团队的需求：希望用本地 agentic coding 工具构建自动化脚本，同时规避 API 费用。提问集中在安装速度、bug 率和易用性，说明这批用户已进入生产部署阶段。

articles.title_en: Garry Tan Builds in Public, Asks for PRs and Feedback
articles.title_zh: Garry Tan 公开开发,主动征集 PR 和反馈
articles.content_en: YC president Garry Tan posted an open call for pull requests and issues on his personal project, JStack, inviting builders to share what they are shipping. The post is a direct example of founder-led community building: use your own audience as a beta-test and feedback loop.
articles.content_zh: YC 主席 Garry Tan 公开为个人项目 JStack 征集 PR 和 issue,同时邀请创业者在该平台上展示自己的产品。这是创始人主导社区运营的典型动作:把自己的受众变成公测用户和反馈闭环。
articles.so_what_en: Post your own WIP publicly and ask for PRs or feedback. Founder transparency converts followers into contributors faster than any ad spend.
articles.so_what_zh: 把自己的在建项目公开发出来,主动要反馈。创始人透明度比广告更快把粉丝变成贡献者。

articles.title_en: DeepSeek-V4 Ships 1M-Token Context for Production Agents
articles.title_zh: DeepSeek-V4 上线百万 token context window，面向生产级 agent
articles.content_en: DeepSeek released V4 with a 1-million-token context window, detailed in a Hugging Face first-party post on April 24. The jump makes it practical for agents to ingest entire product catalogs, campaign histories, or CRM exports in a single call without chunking. Earlier DeepSeek models were already cost-competitive with frontier alternatives; V4 extends that price advantage into long-context workloads where GPT-4o and Claude Sonnet charge significantly more per token.
articles.content_zh: DeepSeek 于 4 月 24 日在 Hugging Face 发布 V4，context window 达 100 万 token。agent 可在单次调用中吞入完整商品目录、历史投放数据或 CRM 导出，无需分片处理。DeepSeek 系列本已在价格上有竞争力，V4 将这一优势延伸至长 context 场景，而 GPT-4o 和 Claude Sonnet 在该区间的单 token 费用明显更高。
articles.so_what_en: If your agent pipeline currently splits long documents into chunks, benchmark DeepSeek-V4 on a real workload this week. Cost savings on long-context inference can fund more agentic runs per campaign.
articles.so_what_zh: 若你的 agent pipeline 正在对长文档做分片，本周用真实任务跑一次 DeepSeek-V4 的 benchmark。长 context inference 省下的成本可用于同一预算内跑更多 agent 轮次。

articles.title_en: Browser Harness Strips the Framework and Lets LLMs Drive Chrome Freely
articles.title_zh: Browser Harness 去掉框架层，让 LLM 直接驱动 Chrome
articles.content_en: Browser-use open-sourced Browser Harness on April 24 via Show HN. Instead of wrapping Chrome in deterministic heuristics, the harness hands the LLM direct control and lets it add new tools on the fly if it needs them. Built-in watchdogs handle native file popups, cross-origin iframes, crash recovery, and download management — the pain points that cause most browser agents to stall mid-task. The project targets developers who found Browser Use's existing library too rigid for complex, multi-step automations.
articles.content_zh: browser-use 于 4 月 24 日在 Show HN 开源 Browser Harness。它去掉了确定性 heuristic 包装层，将 Chrome 直接交给 LLM 控制，LLM 可在运行时按需添加新工具。内置 watchdog 处理原生文件弹窗、跨域 iframe、崩溃恢复和文件下载，这些正是大多数 browser agent 卡死的地方。目标用户是觉得原有 Browser Use 库限制过多、需要跑复杂多步自动化任务的开发者。
articles.so_what_en: Marketing ops teams building browser agents for scraping competitor pricing, auto-filling ad platforms, or monitoring brand mentions should test Browser Harness against their current stall-rate before committing to a heavier framework.
articles.so_what_zh: 正在用 browser agent 做竞品价格抓取、广告平台自动投放或品牌舆情监控的团队，可在选定更重框架前，先用 Browser Harness 测一次任务卡死率。

articles.title_en: Doublespeed: From Virtual Influencers to AI Social Agents
articles.title_zh: Doublespeed：从虚拟网红到 AI Social Agent
articles.content_en:
Doublespeed represents a new category of AI marketing tools. It does not simply generate images, videos, or copy; it helps brands create and operate AI social agents at scale. Brands can design different synthetic personas for different audiences, then test content angles, engagement styles, and conversion paths.

## Key Numbers
- **Metric 1** Companies have invested nearly $1.4B in AI creators / synthetic talent over the past year
- **Metric 2** One person can orchestrate the work of a 30-person creator team at roughly 10% of the cost
- **Metric 3** Positioned as an attention intelligence platform — deploying social agents at scale and learning from audience interactions

## Background
Traditional brand marketing relies on human KOLs, UGC creators, and internal social teams. These approaches are often expensive, inconsistent, and slow to test. Doublespeed's key idea is to productize personas: instead of buying individual pieces of content, brands can create AI accounts that continuously publish, interact, and optimize.

## 1. Turning Personas into Scalable Assets
In the past, working with influencers meant buying access to a real person's audience. With AI social agents, brands can design personas for specific audiences, such as expert reviewers, friendly companions, sharp commentators, or industry specialists.

This means personas become a new type of marketing asset. Brands can test multiple tones and identities at the same time to see which one drives more clicks, DMs, sign-ups, or purchases.

## 2. Not a Content Factory, but an Experiment System
Doublespeed's value is not simply generating more content; it is testing attention faster. A social team may only test a few ideas per week, while AI agents can test dozens of angles, personas, and posting schedules at once.

The real shift is that A/B testing no longer only happens on landing pages. It can now happen at the level of personas, content styles, and interaction patterns.

## 3. Risk: Efficiency Cannot Replace Authenticity
This case is not only about efficiency. If AI accounts pretend to be real people or create fake engagement at scale, they may trigger platform policy issues and damage brand trust.

A safer approach is to clearly disclose AI avatars or virtual creators and use AI for product explainers, localization, short-video scripts, and brand education, rather than fake social proof.

## Transferable Lessons
- **Do not just use AI for content — build an AI content system** Pools of topics, script templates, publishing rhythms, and performance reviews
- **Personas are a new growth surface** Different audiences need different voices; start with three AI personas (expert, companion, reviewer)
- **KPIs should track conversion, not likes** Tie experiments to sign-ups, DMs, demo bookings, or purchases

## This Week's Checklist
- [ ] Design three brand AI personas: target audience, tone, content columns, and prohibited expressions
- [ ] Extract five reusable content formats from your existing library: product demos / user stories / industry insights / FAQs / comparison reviews
- [ ] Generate 30 scripts with AI, manually select five to publish, and track sign-ups, DMs, or clicks
- [ ] Clearly label AI avatars and avoid fake engagement that pretends to come from real people
articles.content_zh:
Doublespeed 代表了一类新的 AI × 营销工具：它不只是生成图片、视频或文案，而是帮助品牌批量创建和运营 AI social agents。品牌可以为不同人群设计不同的虚拟人设，用它们测试内容方向、互动方式和转化路径。

## 关键数据
- **Metric 1** 过去一年企业对 AI creators / synthetic talent 的投入接近 $1.4B
- **Metric 2** 1 人可编排 30 人 creator team 的工作量，以约 10% 成本运行
- **Metric 3** 定位为 attention intelligence platform，批量部署 social agents 并持续学习用户互动

## 背景
传统品牌营销依赖真人 KOL、UGC 创作者和内部社媒团队，但这些方式往往成本高、产能不稳定、测试周期长。Doublespeed 的切入点是把"人设"产品化：品牌不再只是买单条内容，而是创建一组可持续发布、互动和优化的 AI 账号。

## 一、把"人设"变成可复制资产
过去，品牌买 KOL，本质上是买某个真人的影响力。现在，AI social agents 让品牌可以按目标人群设计人设，例如专业测评型、陪伴型、毒舌吐槽型或行业专家型。

这意味着"人设"会变成新的营销资产。品牌可以同时测试多个表达方式，看哪一种更能带来点击、私信、注册或购买。

## 二、不是内容工厂，而是实验系统
Doublespeed 的价值不在于"多生成几条内容"，而在于更快地测试注意力。一个社媒团队过去一周只能测试有限选题；AI agents 可以同时测试几十种内容角度、人设和发布时间。

真正的变化是，A/B testing 不再只发生在 landing page 上，也可以发生在账号人设、内容风格和互动方式上。

## 三、风险：效率不能替代真实性
这个案例不能只看增长效率。AI 虚拟账号如果伪装成真人、批量制造虚假互动，可能引发平台政策和品牌信任风险。

更安全的做法是明确披露 AI avatar / virtual creator 身份，把 AI 用在产品讲解、内容本地化、短视频脚本和品牌教育中，而不是做虚假口碑。

## 三条可迁移经验
- **不要只做 AI content，要做 AI content system** 建立选题池、脚本模板、发布节奏和数据复盘机制
- **人设是新的增长入口** 不同客群需要不同表达；先设计 3 个 AI 人设：专家型、陪伴型、测评型
- **KPI 要看转化，不只看点赞** 绑定注册、私信、demo booking 或购买

## 本周动作清单
- [ ] 设计 3 个品牌 AI 人设：目标用户、语气、内容栏目和禁用表达
- [ ] 从现有内容中拆出 5 类可复用栏目：产品演示 / 用户故事 / 行业观点 / FAQ / 对比测评
- [ ] 用 AI 生成 30 条脚本，人工筛选 5 条发布，并追踪注册、私信或点击
- [ ] 明确标注 AI avatar 身份，不做伪装真人的虚假互动
articles.so_what_en: AI social agents turn personas into testable marketing assets. The content factory model needs to upgrade into an experiment system.
articles.so_what_zh: AI social agent 让"人设"变成可测试的营销资产；内容工厂模式需要升级为实验系统。
